summary: Migrate all IPA web service paths from legacy PHP to REST endpoints.
reason: IPA deprecated PHP-based invocation from WS18 onwards (email from Gestore IPA / AgID, 2026-05-18). WS18–WS23 never had a PHP form; calling them via /public-ws/*.php caused HTTP 500. Source: WS00_INDICE_DEI_SERVIZI.pdf §2 (docs/ipa-reference/).
validated_outcome: go build ./... + go vet ./... pass. Pre-existing test failure in TestAdaptiveLimiter_HalvesOnRateLimit (cliutil) confirmed unrelated to this patch.
